name: users
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `__pb_users_auth__username_idx` ON `users` (username COLLATE NOCASE)

emailTemplate.subject: Login from a new location
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

We noticed a login to your {APP_NAME} account from a new location:

{ALERT_INFO}

If this wasn't you, you should immediately change your {APP_NAME} account password to revoke access from all other locations.

If this was you, you may disregard this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

emailTemplate.subject: OTP for {APP_NAME}
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

Your one-time password is: {OTP}

If you didn't ask for the one-time password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

verificationTemplate.subject: Verify your {APP_NAME} email
verificationTemplate.body:
Hello,

Thank you for joining us at {APP_NAME}.

Click on the button below to verify your email address.

Verify

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

resetPasswordTemplate.subject: Reset your {APP_NAME} password
resetPasswordTemplate.body:
Hello,

Click on the button below to reset your password.

Reset password

If you didn't ask to reset your password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

confirmEmailChangeTemplate.subject: Confirm your {APP_NAME} new email address
confirmEmailChangeTemplate.body:
Hello,

Click on the button below to confirm your new email address.

Confirm new email

If you didn't ask to change your email address, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

name: users_notifications_region
viewQuery: SELECT user_notifications.id, user_notifications.title, user_notifications.description, user_notifications.created, user_notifications.updated, user_notifications.seen, user_notifications.user, members_registry.state, members_registry.area FROM user_notifications INNER JOIN members_registry ON members_registry.id = user_notifications.user ORDER BY user_notifications.created DESC

name: view_can_user_create_event
viewQuery: SELECT users.id, users.id as user FROM users WHERE (SELECT COUNT(events.id) FROM events WHERE events.when_end > DATE('now') AND events.owner = users.id) < 2 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM json_each(users.powers) WHERE value = 'events' OR value LIKE '%events%' OR value = 'super')

name: view_chart_daily_users
viewQuery: SELECT chart.data as id, date(chart.data) as day, COUNT(*) as users FROM chart WHERE chart.chart = "users_login" GROUP BY chart.data ORDER BY date(chart.data) ASC

name: view_chart_monthly_users
viewQuery:
SELECT 
  strftime('%Y-%m', chart.data) AS id,
    strftime('%Y-%m', chart.data) AS month, 
    date(chart.data, 'start of month') AS start_date, 
    date(chart.data, 'start of month', '+1 month', '-1 day') AS end_date, 
    COUNT(*) AS users 
FROM chart 
WHERE chart.chart = "users_login" 
GROUP BY month 
ORDER BY month ASC;

name: view_chart_state_stats_total
viewQuery:
SELECT 
    positions.state as id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state) as total_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.is_spot = FALSE AND events.is_national = FALSE) as state_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.is_spot = TRUE AND events.is_national = FALSE) as spot_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.is_national = TRUE) as national_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals INNER JOIN positions as pos ON deals.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state) as available_deals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_metadata WHERE instr(users_metadata.value, positions.state) > 0 AND users_metadata.key = 'notify_me_events') as notifiable_users
FROM 
    positions
GROUP BY 
    positions.state
ORDER BY
    total_events DESC

name: view_chart_state_stats_yearly
viewQuery:
SELECT 
    positions.state as id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.when_start > DATE('2025-01-01')) as total_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.when_start > DATE('2025-01-01') AND events.is_spot = FALSE AND events.is_national = FALSE) as state_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.when_start > DATE('2025-01-01') AND events.is_spot = TRUE AND events.is_national = FALSE) as spot_events,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events INNER JOIN positions as pos ON events.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state AND events.when_start > DATE('2025-01-01') AND events.is_national = TRUE) as national_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals INNER JOIN positions as pos ON deals.position = pos.id WHERE pos.state = positions.state) as available_deals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_metadata WHERE instr(users_metadata.value, positions.state) > 0 AND users_metadata.key = 'notify_me_events') as notifiable_users
FROM 
    positions
GROUP BY 
    positions.state
ORDER BY
    total_events DESC

name: view_chart_weekly_users
viewQuery:
SELECT 
  strftime('%Y-%W', chart.data) AS id,
    strftime('%Y-%W', chart.data) AS week, 
    date(chart.data, 'weekday 0', '-6 days') AS start_date, 
    date(chart.data, 'weekday 0') AS end_date, 
    COUNT(*) AS users 
FROM chart 
WHERE chart.chart = "users_login" 
GROUP BY week 
ORDER BY week ASC;

name: view_owner_of_event
viewQuery: SELECT (events.id || '_' || users.id) as id, events.id as event, users.id as user, users.avatar, users.email, users.name FROM events INNER JOIN users ON events.owner = users.id

name: view_stats_events
viewQuery: SELECT temptable.id, countOfPeople, evn2.name, evn2.owner, evn2.is_national, evn2.when_start FROM (SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM stamp_users as stmpusr WHERE stmpusr.stamp IN (SELECT stmp.id FROM stamp as stmp WHERE stmp.description = evn.name)) as countOfPeople FROM events as evn) as temptable INNER JOIN events as evn2 ON temptable.id = evn2.id WHERE temptable.countOfPeople > 1 ORDER BY countOfPeople DESC

name: view_users_birthday
viewQuery:
SELECT
    mr.id,
    mr.image,
  mr.name,
  mr.city,
  mr.state,
  mr.area,
  mr.is_active,
  mr.birthdate,
  mr.full_data,
  mr.full_profile_link,
  mr.created,
  mr.updated
FROM members_registry AS mr
WHERE mr.is_active AND STRFTIME('%m-%d', DATETIME(mr.birthdate, "+2 hours")) =
      STRFTIME('%m-%d', DATETIME('now', "+2 hours"));

name: view_users_summary
viewQuery:
SELECT users.id as id, users.username, users.avatar, users.email, 
  users.expire_membership,
  members_registry.birthdate,
  members_registry.area,
  members_registry.full_data,
  CAST((users_devices.firebase_id IS NOT NULL) as BOOL) as can_receive_notifications,
  users.is_membership_active,
  users.addons,
  (users.updated > DATE('2025-11-01')) as saved
  FROM users LEFT JOIN users_devices ON users.id = users_devices.user
  LEFT JOIN members_registry ON members_registry.id = users.id
ORDER BY CAST(users.id AS INT)

name: zitadel_extractor
viewQuery: SELECT members_registry.id, original_mail, members_registry.name, members_registry.city, members_registry.state, members_registry.area, members_registry.is_active, members_registry.birthdate, members_registry.full_data, members_registry.alias_mail, users.expire_membership, users.is_membership_active, users.avatar FROM members_registry LEFT JOIN users on users.id = members_registry.id
